SO_Create_SAP_from_Salesforce.description: Creates SAP Sales Order from Salesforce Opportunity via HTTPS API trigger. Queries opportunity details, transforms to SAP SD format and posts via BAPI.
mapDescriptions: SF Opportunity to SAP SD Order Header (22 fields)
SAP BAPI Response to SF Update (8 fields)

Payroll_Delta_SF_to_SAP_PY.description: Scheduled delta sync of payroll changes from SAP SuccessFactors to SAP Payroll (ERP). Processes employee compensation changes, new hires, and terminations with multi-stage error handling.

shapes.label: SF Payroll to SAP BAPI Structure

mapDescriptions: SuccessFactors Payroll Record → SAP BAPI_HRMASTER_SAVE_REPL_MULT (47 fields)
SAP Error Table → Email Alert Template (12 fields)
Retry Payload → SAP Import Format (34 fields)
Delta Response → Audit Log Structure (8 fields)
Compensation Change → SAP IT0008 Infotype (19 fields)

scripts.name: DeltaFilterScript
scripts.purpose: Filters duplicate records and validates pay period boundaries

scripts.name: RetryOrchestrator
scripts.purpose: Builds retry batches from failed records with exponential backoff

EDI_850_Inbound_PO.description: Receives EDI 850 Purchase Order documents via AS2 from trading partners, validates against trading partner profiles, transforms to SAP IDOC format and posts to SAP MM.
mapDescriptions: EDI 850 X12 → SAP IDOC ORDERS05 (68 fields — 3 segments)
IDOC Error → EDI 997 Acknowledgement (14 fields)
SAP Post Response → Audit Record (9 fields)
Error Object → Email Alert Body (11 fields)
IDOC → Archive Envelope (7 fields)

scripts.name: DuplicateCheckScript
scripts.purpose: Checks EDI control number against dedup table within 30-day window

scripts.name: TradingPartnerValidator
scripts.purpose: Validates ISA/GS segments against registered partner profiles

scripts.name: IDOCStructureValidator
scripts.purpose: Validates IDOC segment sequencing and mandatory field presence

Customer_Master_Dist_Boomi.description: Scheduled distribution of SAP Customer Master (KNA1) changes to downstream systems including Salesforce and data warehouse.
mapDescriptions: SAP KNA1 Master → SF Account (18 fields)
SAP KNA1 Master → DW Customer (24 fields)

Invoice_Outbound_EDIFACT.description: Event-driven outbound EDIFACT INVOIC message generation from SAP FI billing documents to trading partners via AS2.
mapDescriptions: SAP BAPI_BILLINGDOC → EDIFACT INVOIC D96A (52 fields)
SAP FI Data → EDI Archive Envelope (6 fields)
MDN Status → SAP Invoice Status Update (4 fields)
Error Object → Email Alert (9 fields)

scripts.name: EDIFACTEnvelopeBuilder
scripts.purpose: Builds UNA/UNB/UNG envelope segments with partner-specific interchange parameters

Vendor_Master_Sync_Ariba.description: Scheduled sync of SAP Vendor Master (LFA1) changes to SAP Ariba Procurement platform.
mapDescriptions: SAP LFA1 Vendor Record → Ariba Supplier CSV (16 fields)
Ariba Response → Audit Log (5 fields)

Material_Master_Dist.description: Event-driven Material Master (MATMAS) distribution from SAP to downstream EWM, SRM, and Ariba systems.
mapDescriptions: MATMAS IDoc → Normalized Material Object (28 fields)
Normalized Material → Ariba Catalog Item (22 fields)
Distribution Result → Audit Record (7 fields)

SalesOrder_Confirm_CRM.description: API endpoint that accepts SAP Sales Order confirmation events and updates Salesforce CRM opportunity status.

shapes.label: SAP Order Confirm → SF Opportunity Update

mapDescriptions: SAP Order Confirm Payload → SF Opportunity Update (11 fields)

GR_Notification_Ariba.description: Sends Goods Receipt notifications from SAP MM to SAP Ariba for three-way match processing.
mapDescriptions: SAP BAPI GR → Ariba cXML ConfirmationRequest (19 fields)
Ariba Response → Audit Log (5 fields)

scripts.name: cXMLEnvelopeBuilder
scripts.purpose: Builds cXML envelope with Ariba routing credentials

Payment_Status_Update.description: REST API that receives payment status updates from the bank payment gateway and updates SAP FI payment documents.
mapDescriptions: Bank Payment Gateway Response → SAP FI BAPI Input (14 fields)

Employee_New_Hire_SF.description: Event-driven new hire onboarding — creates SAP HCM employee record when new hire is activated in SuccessFactors.
mapDescriptions: SuccessFactors EmpEmployment → SAP HCM PA40 Actions (31 fields)
SF Employee → IT Provisioning Request (14 fields)
SAP HCM Response → Audit Log (6 fields)

scripts.name: PersonalDataMasker
scripts.purpose: Masks PII fields in audit log — retains only employee ID and action type

Inventory_Level_Sync.description: Scheduled batch sync of SAP WM inventory levels to external WMS and e-commerce platform.

shapes.label: Get Stock Levels from SAP WM

mapDescriptions: SAP BAPI Stock Response → WMS Inventory Format (23 fields)
SAP Stock Data → eCommerce Availability JSON (11 fields)

Delivery_Tracking_Update.description: REST API endpoint that receives delivery tracking events from logistics providers and updates SAP SD delivery documents.
mapDescriptions: Carrier Webhook Payload → SAP BAPI Delivery Update (17 fields)
SAP Response → Customer Portal Event (9 fields)

EDI_856_ASN_Outbound.description: Outbound EDI 856 Advance Ship Notice generation from SAP WM goods issue events. Sends to retailer trading partners via AS2 with full carton/item detail.

shapes.label: JMS Event — SAP WM Goods Issue
SAP Delivery + Packing → EDI 856 HL Structure

mapDescriptions: SAP Delivery + Packing Data → EDI 856 HL Structure (74 fields — 4 loop levels)
EDI 856 Base → Partner-Specific Variant (38 fields)
SAP Shipment Response → EDI Archive Record (8 fields)
Trading Partner Config → EDI Envelope Parameters (12 fields)
EDI Send Result → Audit Log (7 fields)

scripts.name: SSCCLabelBuilder
scripts.purpose: Generates SSCC-18 barcode values and builds hierarchical carton structure

scripts.name: HL_SegmentOrchestrator
scripts.purpose: Builds multi-level HL loop hierarchy (shipment/order/pack/item) dynamically

PO_Change_Notification.description: Event-driven notification of SAP Purchase Order changes to SAP Ariba for supplier collaboration.
mapDescriptions: SAP BAPI_PO_GETDETAIL1 → Ariba OrderAmendment cXML (26 fields)
Ariba Response → Audit Record (5 fields)

scripts.name: cXMLAmendmentBuilder
scripts.purpose: Builds cXML OrderAmendment envelope with change reason codes and versioning

Cost_Center_Hierarchy_Sync.description: Scheduled sync of SAP CO Cost Center hierarchy to corporate reporting and budgeting tools.
mapDescriptions: SAP Cost Center Node → Reporting Hierarchy Object (9 fields)

HR_Org_Structure_Publish.description: Scheduled publish of SAP HCM Organizational Structure to SuccessFactors, Active Directory, and downstream reporting.

shapes.label: Extract Org Units from SAP HCM
SAP OM → Active Directory OU Structure
Update AD via Groovy LDAP Script
Post Org Data to Reporting API

mapDescriptions: SAP HCM Org Unit → SF MDF Department (28 fields)
SAP OM Hierarchy → AD OU Path Structure (15 fields)
SAP Org Node → Reporting Hierarchy JSON (19 fields)
Sync Result → Audit Record (7 fields)

scripts.name: LDAPConnector
scripts.purpose: Connects to Active Directory via JNDI LDAP to create/update OU entries

scripts.name: OrgDeltaComparator
scripts.purpose: Compares current org snapshot with previous run to generate change set only

Customer_Credit_Check.description: Synchronous API that queries SAP SD credit limit data and returns credit status to Salesforce CPQ.

shapes.label: Get Credit Data from SAP SD
SAP Credit Data → SF CPQ Response

mapDescriptions: SAP BAPI Credit Response → Salesforce CPQ Credit Object (12 fields)
Cache Entry → DB Credit Record (7 fields)

Supplier_Invoice_Inbound.description: SFTP listener that picks up supplier invoice files (PDF + XML), validates, and posts to SAP FI for three-way match.

shapes.label: Supplier Invoice XML → SAP LIV Format

mapDescriptions: Supplier XML Invoice (UBL/EDIFACT) → SAP BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_CREATE (41 fields)
Validation Error Object → AP Team Alert Email (13 fields)
SAP Posting Response → Invoice Log Record (9 fields)
Invoice Header → Archive Index (7 fields)

scripts.name: InvoiceValidator
scripts.purpose: Validates invoice against PO tolerances, duplicate check, and VAT number verification

Product_Catalog_Sync.description: Scheduled sync of SAP Material Master product data to e-commerce product catalog API.
mapDescriptions: SAP MARA/MAKT Material Data → eCommerce Product JSON (16 fields)

Sales_Quota_Upload.description: Simple API endpoint that accepts CSV sales quota uploads from finance and creates Salesforce Quota records.
mapDescriptions: Finance CSV Row → Salesforce Quota__c Record (8 fields)

Payslip_Distribution.description: Scheduled distribution of payslip PDFs from SAP HCM to employee self-service via SFTP and email.
mapDescriptions: SAP Payslip List → Distribution Batch Object (12 fields)
Employee Data → Portal File Path (6 fields)
Payslip Metadata → Email Notification (9 fields)

scripts.name: PDFEncryptor
scripts.purpose: Encrypts payslip PDFs with employee-specific password before upload to portal

Bank_Statement_Recon.description: Complex bank statement reconciliation — ingests MT940/CAMT.053 files from SFTP, matches to SAP FI open items, posts clearing entries, and generates exception reports.
mapDescriptions: MT940 SWIFT Statement → Internal Statement Format (34 fields)
CAMT.053 ISO 20022 → Internal Statement Format (41 fields)
Matched Items → SAP Clearing BAPI Input (22 fields)
Unmatched Items → Exception Report (17 fields)
Reconciliation Summary → Finance Email (12 fields)

scripts.name: FileFormatDetector
scripts.purpose: Detects and validates MT940 vs CAMT.053 format from first 3 lines of statement file

scripts.name: ReconMatchingEngine
scripts.purpose: Multi-rule matching engine: exact amount + ref, amount + date tolerance, fuzzy reference matching

scripts.name: ExceptionReportBuilder
scripts.purpose: Builds structured exception report with aged unmatched items and suggested actions

Service_Order_Create.description: API that creates SAP PM Service Orders from external field service management platform.

shapes.label: Update FSM with SAP Order ID

mapDescriptions: FSM Work Order → SAP PM Order BAPI Input (29 fields)
SAP PM Response → FSM Update Payload (12 fields)
Service Order → Audit Log (8 fields)

scripts.name: TechnicianAssigner
scripts.purpose: Queries technician availability calendar and assigns based on skill set and proximity

Contract_Management_Sync.description: Scheduled sync of SAP MM Contract data (ME31K/ME32K) to SAP Ariba Contract Management.
mapDescriptions: SAP MM Contract EKKO/EKPO → Ariba Contract Workspace (21 fields)
Ariba Response → Audit Record (5 fields)

Warehouse_Transfer_Order.description: Event-driven warehouse transfer order processing — creates WMS pick instructions from SAP WM Transfer Orders.

shapes.label: JMS Event — SAP WM Transfer Order
Fetch TO Details from SAP WM

mapDescriptions: SAP WM Transfer Order → WMS Pick Instruction (26 fields)
Priority Flag Logic → WMS Routing Decision (4 fields)
WMS Confirmation → SAP TO Status Update (8 fields)

scripts.name: TOConfirmationHandler
scripts.purpose: Handles partial confirmations and splits multi-bin TOs into individual pick tasks

Customer_Returns_RMA.description: RMA workflow — creates SAP SD return order from Salesforce case, triggers warehouse return receipt, and updates CRM.

shapes.label: SF Case → SAP SD Return Order

mapDescriptions: Salesforce Case → SAP VA01 Return Order BAPI (24 fields)
SAP Return Order → SF Case Update (9 fields)

scripts.name: WarehouseNotifier
scripts.purpose: Builds warehouse alert email with return label barcode and expected arrival window

GL_Journal_Posting.description: Scheduled GL journal posting from external expense management system to SAP FI.

shapes.label: Post GL Journal to SAP FI

mapDescriptions: Expense Report Lines → SAP FI GL Journal BAPI (19 fields)
SAP Posting Response → Expense Status Update (5 fields)

Production_Order_Status.description: Event-driven publication of SAP PP Production Order status changes to MES and customer portal.

shapes.label: SAP PP Order → MES Status Update
Push Status to Customer Portal — Groovy

mapDescriptions: SAP PP Order Status → MES Order Object (18 fields)
MES Status → Customer Portal Status (8 fields)

scripts.name: CustomerPortalPublisher
scripts.purpose: Formats status update for customer portal API with estimated completion recalculation

EDI_810_Invoice_Outbound.description: Outbound EDI 810 Invoice generation from SAP SD billing documents to retailer trading partners. Handles multiple trading partner formats and compliance requirements.
mapDescriptions: SAP BAPI Billing → EDI 810 X12 Base (59 fields — ISA/GS/ST segments)
EDI 810 Base → Walmart Partner-Specific Variant (41 fields)
SAP Response → 997 Functional Acknowledgement (14 fields)
MDN Status → SAP Invoice EDI Flag (4 fields)
810 Transmission → EDI Archive Record (8 fields)

scripts.name: TradingPartnerRemapper
scripts.purpose: Applies partner-specific EDI mapping rules from configuration database

scripts.name: TaxComplianceHandler
scripts.purpose: Validates and reformats tax segments for cross-border invoice compliance (CA/EU)

scripts.name: MDNRetryOrchestrator
scripts.purpose: Implements configurable retry with exponential backoff for MDN non-receipt
